layers.name: data_truth
layers.purpose: freshness, provider health, resampling completeness, closed-bar discipline

layers.name: memory_engine
layers.purpose: historical watch/context support; memory is an input, not a trade

layers.name: setup_engine
layers.purpose: detect market condition that may become actionable after trigger and blocker checks

layers.name: trigger_engine
layers.purpose: detect price-behavior confirmation/timing; trigger alone is not a trade

layers.name: quality_vector
layers.purpose: multi-dimensional quality/fit vector; not a probability claim

layers.name: signal_candidate
layers.purpose: manual-review candidate object; not execution and not a trade instruction

layers.name: trade_plan_draft
layers.purpose: entry/invalidation/target draft after future gate; manual review only

layers.name: risk_model_draft
layers.purpose: risk tier and position-size draft after future gate; never order execution

layers.name: forward_shadow_trade_plan
layers.purpose: evaluate frozen manual-review trade-plan drafts without live execution

layers.name: broker_execution
layers.purpose: explicitly out of scope for E; requires separate F authorization
